name: Butterflied Cornish Hens Rubbed with Lemon Garlic Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Lemon Garlic Butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
2. In a small saucepan over medium heat, bring the lemon juice to a boil and reduce to the consistency of honey. Set aside.
3. In a food processor, blend the lemon syrup, garlic, butter, and season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Brush the hens with olive oil and season with salt and freshly ground pepper. Sprinkle with Ancho powder.
5. Grill skin side down over medium-low heat, covered, for 15 minutes until the skin is brown and crispy. Turn the hens over and cook an additional 5 minutes or until done.
6. Remove from the grill and rub generously with Lemon Garlic Butter at room temperature.
